title: Tilray Brands Delivers Record Q2 Fiscal 2026 Net Revenue of $218 Million, Moves to Net Cash Position and Reaffirms Full-Year Adjusted EBITDA Guidance
text: Tilray Brands reported record second-quarter fiscal 2026 results with net revenue reaching $217.5 million, representing a 3% increase year-over-year. The company achieved notable growth in specific segments: international cannabis revenue jumped 36%, while Canadian adult-use cannabis climbed 6%. Key financial highlights include: Gross profit was $57.5 million (down from $61.2 million prior year). Distribution revenue was $85.3 million, the company's highest quarterly performance in this segment. Net loss was $(43.5) million, a substantial improvement from $(85.3) million in the prior year. Cash position reached $291.6 million in cash and marketable securities. Net cash improved to $27.4 million from a net debt position of $3.8 million in Q1. However, beverage revenue declined to $50.1 million from $63.1 million year-over-year, and gross margin contracted to 26% from 29%. CEO Irwin Simon stated: We achieved another record quarter with net revenue reaching $218 million, a result of disciplined execution. The company reaffirmed full-year adjusted EBITDA guidance of $62–$72 million and emphasized readiness to capitalize on anticipated U.S. federal cannabis rescheduling opportunities through its Tilray Medical USA platform.
